title: Snorlax Boss
description: Adds Snorlax as new Endboss to minecraft
body:
# Snorlax Boss

<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/gYS3owMpKLQ" title="Ich code einen NEUEN Minecraft ENDBOSS in 24 STUNDEN" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Adds [Snorlax](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Snorlax) as a new endboss to minecraft!

## Attacks

The mod features many cool new attacks:

### Beam Attack

![Beam-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRl6luUk/images/9574031768974534975ec99a4890289c30ffd10e.png)
![Beam-2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRl6luUk/images/0454167e3b68c1f1aac10280e1ea866c29425568.png)
![Beam-3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRl6luUk/images/d2e072c637394e8e6b49f13293ca04a3c6bfa0ce.png)

### Shake Attack

![Shake-1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YRl6luUk/images/1c29b984f12a10d199d0848b8ccad0b2441425dc.png)
